sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH db2_data AS (
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD <> '@{variables('Source')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Source')}'
),
transformed_data AS (
    SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD
    FROM db2_data
)
SELECT COUNT(*) as link_count FROM transformed_data

parameters.subject: IDS HCG Abort
parameters.body:
The IDS Indv Be Mara Cntl cannot run while there is another process listed on the P_RUN_CYC as running.   This job is being halted.

SOURCE:           COBALTTALON
SUBJECT:          CLM_LN_HLTH_CST
TARGET:           IDS
FREQUENCY:    MONTHLY

parameters.subject: CLAIM LN HEALTH RPLC FILE(S) NOT RECEIVED FOR  MILLIMAN HCG
parameters.body:
The IDS - CblTalnClmLnHlthCstGrpCntl has begun running for the month as the files have arrived but had a soft abend as one of the below files has not been received or is in the wrong naming convention.

ZENA JOB : MBRRISK_IDS_HCG_RPLC_MNTHLY_WRHS_000

FILE NAME : MILLIMAN.BLUEKC_HCGRPLC_OUTPUT*.TXT

parameters.subject: @concat(pipeline().parameters.Vars_MonthYear,' HCG RPLC  file processed  ')
parameters.body: HCG files are processed and data is available in IDS. Attached file contains number of rows processed. EDW tables will be available in an hour.
